turns.content:
Bạn là **subagent hm-l2-researcher**. Bạn đang được phân công nghiên cứu kiến trúc OpenCode SDK/API.

## NHIỆM VỤ
Nghiên cứu sâu kiến trúc OpenCode platform, tập trung vào:

### 1. SDK API Surface
- `session.messages({ path })` — cấu trúc trả về `{ info: Message, parts: Part[] }`
- `session.prompt({ path, body })` — cách gửi prompt, structured output
- `session.command({ path, body })` — slash command execution
- `session.children({ path })` — parent-child session hierarchy
- `session.create({ body })` — session creation với parent session
- `event.subscribe()` — SSE event stream cho real-time capture

### 2. Message/Part Types
- Các loại `Part` trong SDK: `text`, `thinking`, `tool`, `image`, `file` v.v.
- Thinking/reasoning blocks: `type: "thinking"` — cấu trúc, metadata
- Cách OpenCode xử lý extended thinking từ Claude, Gemini thinking, OpenAI reasoning
- Issue #9364: "Claude Extended Thinking requires assistant messages must start with thinking block"
- Issue #10805: Jinja exception "Cannot pass both content and thinking in assistant message"

### 3. Plugin Hooks
- `message.part.updated` — khi nào fired, payload shape
- `message.updated` — full message update events
- `session.created`, `session.updated`, `session.compacted`
- `tool.execute.before`, `tool.execute.after`
- `permission.asked`, `permission.replied`
- Cách plugin có thể intercept thinking blocks

### 4. Permission Model
- Agent permissions trong YAML frontmatter
- Permission inheritance giữa main agent và subagents
- `allow`, `ask`, `deny` modes
- Cách regex cho granular tool control

### 5. Agent Modes
- `all`, `primary`, `subagent` modes
- Cách subagent sessions được tạo (parent-child relationship)
- Session hierarchy và delegation depth

## PHƯƠNG PHÁP
1. Đọc OpenCode SDK types từ GitHub: https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/sdk/js/src/gen/types.gen.ts
2. Đọc session/prompt.ts: https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode/blob/dev/packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts
3. Đọc message-v2.ts nếu có
4. Search GitHub issues về thinking/reasoning blocks
5. Đọc plugin docs: https://opencode.ai/docs/plugins/

## OUTPUT YÊU CẦU
Viết vào file: `.research/opencode-sdk-architecture-2026-05-18.md`

Format:
```markdown
# OpenCode SDK Architecture — Thinking/Reasoning Block Integration Points

## 1. SDK API Surface
[Bảng các endpoints liên quan]

## 2. Message/Part Type System
[Cấu trúc Part types, thinking blocks]

## 3. Plugin Hook Integration Points
[Cách hooks có thể capture thinking]

## 4. Permission & Agent Mode Architecture
[Permission inheritance, agent modes]

## 5. Key Integration Points for Thinking Extraction
[Điểm có thể hook vào để extract thinking blocks]

## 6. Limitations & Gaps
[Những gì SDK không expose được]
```

NGÔN NGỮ: Tiếng Việt cho mô tả, English cho technical terms/code refs.
KHÔNG implement code — chỉ nghiên cứu và viết tài liệu.

## Research Report

**Agent:** hm-l2-researcher
**Domain:** Research
**Question:** OpenCode SDK architecture — thinking/reasoning block integration points
**Status:** COMPLETED

### Findings

- `types.gen.ts` [L2] — SDK defines 12 Part types including `ReasoningPart` as first-class citizen (not subtype of TextPart)
- `message-v2.ts` [L2] — `ReasoningPart` schema: `{ id, sessionID, messageID, type: "reasoning", text, metadata?, time: { start, end? } }` — NO `synthetic` or `ignored` fields
- `message-v2.ts` [L2] — NO `ReasoningPartInput` exposed — clients cannot send reasoning blocks, only LLM providers create them
- `processor.ts` [L2] — Reasoning streamed via 3 events: `reasoning-start`, `reasoning-delta`, `reasoning-end` — stored in `reasoningMap` with provider metadata (signatures)
- `transform.ts` [L2] — Anthropic requires reasoning blocks BEFORE other content; empty text parts between reasoning replaced with `" "` to preserve signatures (fix for #16748)
- `transform.ts` [L2] — Bedrock has same signature preservation requirement; issue #18078: `trimEnd()` invalidates signatures
- `transform.ts` [L2] — When switching models mid-session, reasoning parts converted to text (loses metadata/signatures)
- `types.gen.ts` [L2] — Agent modes: `"subagent" | "primary" | "all"` with permission inheritance (edit, bash with regex, webfetch, doom_loop, external_directory)
- Plugin docs [L3] — `message.part.updated` event fires for all parts including reasoning; `experimental.text.complete` does NOT apply to reasoning
- GitHub issues #9364, #3077, #6176, #11439, #11571, #15271, #16748, #18078, #25129 [L3] — Document known bugs with extended thinking across providers

### Cross-Source Conflicts

- None detected — all sources (types.gen.ts, message-v2.ts, processor.ts, transform.ts, plugin docs, GitHub issues) are consistent

### Synthesized Artifact

**File written:** `.research/opencode-sdk-architecture-2026-05-18.md` (489 lines)

Contains 8 sections:
1. SDK API Surface (endpoints, client methods, response structure)
2. Message/Part Type System (12 part types, ReasoningPart schema, ToolPart state machine)
3. Plugin Hook Integration Points (12 hooks, 3 methods to capture thinking, processor event handling)
4. Permission & Agent Mode Architecture (AgentConfig, Agent runtime, permission inheritance, 3 agent modes)
5. Key Integration Points for Thinking Extraction (5 integration points, provider-specific handling, model message conversion)
6. Limitations & Gaps (6 SDK limitations, 10 known GitHub issues, 6 architectural observations)
7. Evidence Index (8 claims with source + evidence level)
8. Recommendations (5 actionable next steps)

### Knowledge Gaps

- Internal LLM streaming implementation (`llm.stream()`) — not fully traced in this research
- AI SDK `convertToModelMessages()` behavior — how it transforms reasoning parts for different providers
- WebUI thinking block visibility logic — issue #7866 mentions hardcoded `hideReasoning={!working()}`

### Recommendations

1. **For thinking extraction:** Use `message.part.updated` plugin hook, filter `part.type === "reasoning"`
2. **For real-time streaming:** Subscribe to SSE `/global/event` — `EventMessagePartUpdated` has `delta` field
3. **DO NOT trim reasoning text** — breaks Anthropic/Bedrock signature validation (issues #16748, #18078)
4. **For model switching:** Filter or convert reasoning parts when replaying to different model
5. **Use `@opencode-ai/plugin`** for type-safe plugin development

### Next

Research complete. File ready for consumption by downstream agents or implementation planning.
